name: api_nano_banana_pro_2img
description: Google Gemini 3 Pro Image (a.k.a. Nano Banana Pro) via the GeminiImage2Node API node. Takes two reference images plus a text prompt and returns a single composited image. Aspect ratio and resolution are baked into the workflow (1:1 at 1K by default) — edit the template JSON to change them. Runs via a Comfy Cloud API node (requires a configured API key).

prompt.description: Text instruction describing how the two reference images should be composited or transformed.

image1.description: First reference image (slot 0 in the batch).

image2.description: Second reference image (slot 1 in the batch).
